name: io.github.mharnett/bing-ads
description: MCP server for Microsoft Advertising (Bing Ads) API — campaigns, ad groups, keywords, performance reports, search term reports, shared negative keyword lists, and budget management. Built-in resilience with retry, circuit breaker, and response size limiting.

environmentVariables.name: BING_ADS_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD app client ID for OAuth

environmentVariables.name: BING_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: OAuth refresh token for Microsoft Advertising API

environmentVariables.name: BING_ADS_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Azure AD app client secret (optional for public clients)
